description_long: This is a retail package of Pink Fish tilapia fillets, presented in a glossy, resealable black plastic pouch. The front of the package features a clear window displaying two pink-and-white fish fillets inside, with bold white text reading 'PINK FISH' and additional product details in Portuguese. The lower front section has a wavy line pattern, while the back displays nutritional information, ingredients, and preparation instructions in white text. The pouch is gusseted at the bottom, allowing it to stand upright, and the top is heat-sealed with a tear notch for opening. The overall appearance is modern and clean, with a focus on freshness and product visibility.
description: A glossy black resealable pouch containing Pink Fish tilapia fillets, with a clear window showing the fillets and bold white branding on the front.
description_view_0: Front view shows the clear window with visible tilapia fillets, bold 'PINK FISH' branding, and product details.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the slim profile of the pouch and the thickness of the contents inside.
description_view_2: Back view displays nutritional information, ingredients, and preparation instructions in white text on a black background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the pouch's slimness and partial product visibility.
attribute_brand_logo: A circular white logo with a fish icon and text, located on the front lower right of the pouch.
attribute_flavor_indication: The text 'FILÉ DE TILAPIA' and the image of tilapia fillets indicate the product is tilapia flavored.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel and ingredients list are visible on the back of the package.
